# Intra Vector → Minimum Intra-Vector

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Intra Vector → Minimum Intra-Vector

Minimum Intra-Vector

Instruction Type and Width         Instruction description
                                   Performs an intra-vector minimum operation between sources
                                   that are located in the same vector. Each source is 32-bit wide.
Vector Minimum Intra-Vector
                                   The destination is 32-bit wide or 40-bit wide determined by the
                                   vector register type.
                                   Performs an intra-vector minimum operation between sources
                                   that are located in the same vector. Each source is 16-bit wide.
Vector Minimum Intra-Vector Word
                                   The destination is 16-bit wide or 20-bit wide determined by the
                                   vector register type.
